purpose: Single source of truth for tool/skill/MCP capability discovery and routing.

usage_contract.prompt_injection: Inject a concise snapshot from this registry into SYSTEM prompt context.
usage_contract.runtime_policy: Prefer deterministic routing from this registry over ad-hoc driver prompt heuristics.
usage_contract.mcp_lifecycle: Default disabled unless needed; enable on demand and allow idle disable.
usage_contract.conflict_resolution: SYSTEM safety rules > this registry > AGENTS tactical hints > driver-specific style guidance.

core.name: question
core.capability: Collect explicit user decisions and disambiguation inputs; prefer this for bounded choices, missing critical parameters, and ambiguous natural-language requests instead of freeform clarification

core.name: bash
core.capability: Run terminal commands for git/build/test/runtime operations

core.name: read
core.capability: Read file contents with offsets and line numbers

core.name: apply_patch
core.capability: Patch files safely using structured diffs

skills.selection_rule: Load skill when intent matches domain; do not reinvent instructions already encoded in skills.

runtime_observed.name: filesystem
runtime_observed.capability: Scoped local filesystem operations via MCP

runtime_observed.name: sequential-thinking
runtime_observed.capability: Structured decomposition for long reasoning tasks

runtime_observed.name: system-manager
runtime_observed.capability: OpenCode runtime control, model/account switching, MCP toggling

runtime_observed.name: drawmiat
runtime_observed.capability: IDEF0 / Grafcet (IEC 60848) diagram renderer — generates SVG from structured JSON

tools.name: generate_diagram
tools.description: Generate SVG diagram(s) from IDEF0 or Grafcet JSON. Accepts diagram_type (grafcet|idef0), json_payload (string), and optional output_dir. Returns inline SVG + saved paths + diagnostics.

tools.name: validate_diagram
tools.description: Validate IDEF0 or Grafcet JSON structure without generating SVG. Returns validation logs, warnings, and errors.

mcp_servers.discovery: Source status from global opencode.json and system-manager_get_system_status before deciding toggles.

fallback: miatdiagram skill for JSON generation, then drawmiat MCP for SVG rendering
notes: Use miatdiagram skill for text-to-JSON conversion, then drawmiat MCP for JSON-to-SVG rendering.
drawmiat supports hierarchical IDEF0 decomposition (multiple SVGs) and Grafcet sub-grafcets.
Prefer beta-tool for project-aware local repo/worktree orchestration.
Do not silently guess repo root, base branch, beta path, runtime policy, or merge target; use question when bounded clarification is needed.
Treat all switching as session-based; do not assume global control-plane semantics.
If a natural-language request is ambiguous, use question before calling a switch tool.
Do not silently fallback or guess provider/account/model/session targets.
When the next step depends on a bounded user decision, prefer question over freeform clarification.
Use question when a request is ambiguous or when a critical provider/account/model/session field is missing.
Do not ask plain conversational follow-ups if the choice can be represented as explicit options.

mcp_policy.deactivation: disable when task ends or after idle timeout
